repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.data-quality: Great Expectations validation suite, freshness and completeness checks, null and duplicate handling, data contract enforcement, schema checks, and data drift detection
set up a CI pipeline to build and publish a container image

retrieval_query: data quality data validation freshness completeness null duplicate data contract schema check great expectations anomaly detection data drift threshold expectation

validation_smoke.name: code.data-quality L3 validation smoke
signals: expectation suite passes on landed data with thresholds met
freshness check confirms the latest partition is within SLA
completeness and uniqueness checks pass on key columns
schema check matches the data contract
drift metric compared to a baseline and within tolerance

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.data-quality diagnosis smoke
signals: null rate on a key column jumps with no alert
duplicate keys appear after an upstream change
the latest partition is stale but the pipeline reported success
a new source column violates the contract silently
feature distribution drifts away from the training baseline
